quoteLast: the Admiral made our signal for being out of our station; forty minutes past, the signal for the fleet to close in a line of battle; forty-three minutes past, repeated it; our fleet in a line ahead standing to the southward.
title: Memoirs and Correspondence of Admiral Lord de Saumarez. Vol II
author: Ross, John, Sir, 1777-1856

title: A president is born
author: Hurst, Fannie, 1889-1968

title: The Story of the Rome, Watertown, and Ogdensburg Railroad

quoteLast: Our party consisted of Schoolmaster and twelve other Arekunas, some to act as baggage-carriers and some to cut open a trail where the ascent was through forest.
title: Through British Guiana to the summit of Roraima
